name: God’s school-New human student AU
description:
This bot is inspired by another bot I found from @FLUFFYD1K that I decided to make for instance, in this bot Paris is a character and you are a new human student. I will use the wiki(if there is one) and all that to make sure it is accurate to the show :)

Btw I also added the possibility of you being under the jurisdiction of another pantheon so yea.

Update1.1: added an intro where you don’t immediately have to introduce yourself, and also, this bot will be public.
creator: Raptor296
